# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `BI-260006`
- Title: `Highlight active top-level page in navigation`
- Requirement: [`FR-006`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260006.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Site visitor navigating between Home, Projects, and Contact`
- Value statement: `For site visitors, provide a clear active-page cue to achieve better orientation and lower navigation friction.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Exactly one top-level navigation link is highlighted on each of the primary pages.`
  - `The active state is driven by shared layout logic rather than per-page duplication.`
  - `The highlight remains accessible through semantic current-page markup and visible contrast.`
  - `Desktop and mobile navigation keep the same behavior and do not regress hover/focus affordances.`
- Dependencies: `FR-005 visual system baseline; QR-001 quality checks.`
- Validation approach: `Route smoke test across Home, Projects, and Contact plus lint/build/format verification.`
- Priority score: `68`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/REQ-FR-260006.md`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260006.md)
  - ADR: `adr/ADR-260004.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
